history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up anime-style illustration shows a smiling girl with short light-brown hair as a hand reaches toward her head, alongside large Indonesian text at the bottom.

Main Subject:
An anime-style young girl with light-brown, short hair is shown in a close-up from the front-left side. Her eyes are closed with a cheerful expression, mouth open in a smile, and she wears a small pale flower hair accessory near the top side of her hair. A person’s hand with light skin enters from the left, holding or touching the side of her head or hair. She appears to be wearing a white garment with a pale collar, and part of a red garment is visible near her shoulder.

Setting:
The background is plain and minimal, mostly pale or light-colored, with no clear outdoor or room details visible.

Visual Details:
The girl’s hair has soft highlights and straight bangs. The lighting is even and bright, typical of a digital illustration. The hand is positioned near her head, and the composition is tightly cropped around the face and upper hair. At the bottom, thick, bold, block letters read “JANGAN BANG” in large white text with a black outline, and there is an additional crying-face emoji in a yellow/orange circle appearing after the text.

Visible Text:
JANGAN BANG

Practical Summary:
The image is an anime-style close-up of a smiling girl with eyes closed and a hand reaching near her hair. Large bold Indonesian text appears across the bottom of the image with a crying emoji to the right.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
